title: New feature: Custom objects
excerpt:
We are excited to announce the brand-new custom object feature! :sunglasses: 
This feature allows you to create a view outside the context of a board, item, or dashboard. It will live independently in the left-pane menu,…

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are excited to announce the brand-new custom object feature!

This feature allows you to create a view outside the context of a board, item, or dashboard. It will live independently in the left-pane menu, making your app more visible to account users. You also get more real estate on the monday platform, as anything displayed as a custom object will span the entire screen (except for the title and top header).

The process remains the same to implement this view, but you cannot use monday’s native settings. Check out our documentation to learn more!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
This is Great News!

A big thank you to the monday.com team!
